title: Toolbot
description: Switches to the correct tool for the job, automagicaly! AKA: Client-side Auto tool !
body:
Client-side mod to automatically switch to the correct tool for breaking blocks.
Has switch-back functionality.
AKA: Client-side Auto tool !


Please be aware to NOT use this mod in big servers: ie Hypixel - it might be considered an unfair advantage and you risk getting **banned**.

For reporting issues etc, join the discord!
